lintsinghua/DeepAudit ·GitHub ⭐ 5209 Python · Code Audit, AI Code Review, Security, Static Analysis, SAST, Developer Tools, Open Source

What it is

XCodeReviewer (formerly DeepAudit) is a sophisticated code auditing platform powered by large language models. It provides deep, intention-aware analysis of codebases, identifying security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, and maintainability issues that traditional static analysis tools often miss.

Problems solved

  • Rigid rules and high false-positive rates of traditional static analysis (SAST) tools
  • High cost and time required for manual code reviews in large teams
  • Vague error messages (XCodeReviewer provides 'What-Why-How' fix suggestions)

How to get started

Deploy via Vercel for a cloud-ready experience or use Docker for local hosting. Connect your GitHub/GitLab token to scan repositories. The platform supports over 10 LLM providers including Gemini, Claude, OpenAI, and local Ollama instances.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

lintsinghua/DeepAudit is positioned as a xcodereviewer (formerly deepaudit) is a sophisticated code auditing platform powered by large language models. it provides deep, intention-aware analysis of codebases, identifying security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, and maintainability issues that traditional static analysis tools often miss. It aims to provide developers with a robust, Python-based solution for deepaudit：人人拥有的 ai 黑客战队，让漏洞挖掘触手可及。国内首个开源的代码漏洞挖掘多智能体系统。小白一键部署运行，自主协作审计 + 自动化沙箱 poc 验证。支持 ollama 私有部署 ，一键生成报告。支持中转站。​让安全不再昂贵，让审计不再复杂。.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Traditional methods in this domain often suffer from Rigid rules and high false-positive rates of traditional static analysis (SAST) tools. lintsinghua/DeepAudit addresses this by xcodereviewer (formerly deepaudit) is a sophisticated code auditing platform powered by large language models. it provides deep, intention-aware analysis of codebases, identifying security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, and maintainability issues that traditional static analysis tools often miss, offering a significant performance boost and better developer ergonomics compared to existing alternatives.

3. Technical Architecture

The project is built using Python, adopting a modular and scalable design. It leverages modern industry standards to ensure compatibility across different environments, focusing on efficiency and ease of integration.

4. Core Implementation

Main logic revolves around deepaudit：人人拥有的 ai 黑客战队，让漏洞挖掘触手可及。国内首个开源的代码漏洞挖掘多智能体系统。小白一键部署运行，自主协作审计 + 自动化沙箱 poc 验证。支持 ollama 私有部署 ，一键生成报告。支持中转站。​让安全不再昂贵，让审计不再复杂。. The implementation utilizes Python's strengths to provide xcodereviewer (formerly deepaudit) is a sophisticated code auditing platform powered by large language models. it provides deep, intention-aware analysis of codebases, identifying security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, and maintainability issues that traditional static analysis tools often miss, ensuring high reliability and performance under load.

5. Code Organization

The repository is structured logically, with core functionality separated from utilities and examples. This organization facilitates easy navigation and contribution for developers looking to extend the tool's capabilities.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

To get started, deploy via vercel for a cloud-ready experience or use docker for local hosting. connect your github/gitlab token to scan repositories. the platform supports over 10 llm providers including gemini, claude, openai, and local ollama instances. This will allow you to quickly evaluate the tool and integrate it into your existing development workflow.

7. Summary

An essential, Python-powered utility that streamlines deepaudit：人人拥有的 ai 黑客战队，让漏洞挖掘触手可及。国内首个开源的代码漏洞挖掘多智能体系统。小白一键部署运行，自主协作审计 + 自动化沙箱 poc 验证。支持 ollama 私有部署 ，一键生成报告。支持中转站。​让安全不再昂贵，让审计不再复杂。; it effectively tackles Rigid rules and high false-positive rates of traditional static analysis (SAST) tools while maintaining a high standard of code quality and usability.
